B

BACKGROUND_WHITE - Static variable in class app.gui.style.AppColors
The standard stark white backdrop surface fill applied across cards and primary components.
BaseAnomaliesDetectionService - Class in app.service.impl.anomalies
Concrete implementation of AnomaliesDetectionService that utilizes the Smile library's IsolationForest algorithm to detect structural deviations and pricing anomalies within financial datasets
BaseAnomaliesDetectionService() - Constructor for class app.service.impl.anomalies.BaseAnomaliesDetectionService
 
BoldLabel - Class in app.gui.components
A customized JLabel that forces its display text to be bold.
BoldLabel(String) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.BoldLabel
Constructs a BoldLabel initialized with the specified text string.
buildAnomaliesDetectionService(String, String, LocalDateTime) - Static method in class app.service.AnomaliesDetectionServiceFactory
Dynamically instantiates a specified anomaly detection service implementation after verifying that the provided boundary constraints, thresholds, and application data states are fully valid.
